docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2016 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE, AND TO ACCOMMODATE BOTH PARTIES, TO NOV-22-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL GREEN & DEFENDANT DEBORAH HELLER MAY APPEAR VIA TELEPHONE. IF THE PARTIES WISH TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE THEY ARE INSTRUCTED TO CONTACT THE COURT'S APPROVED VENDOR, COURTCALL, AT 1-888-88-COURT, OR 1-888-882-6878, TO ARRANGE FOR THEIR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCES. THE PARTIES ARE RESPONSIBLE FOR ALL FEES ASSOCIATED WITH THIS SERVICE FROM COURTCOURT. IF APPEARING BY TELEPHONE, ANY EVIDENCE THE PARTIES WISH TO PRESENT AT TRIAL (I.E. DOCUMENTS, PICTURES, ETC.) SHALL BE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT AT LEAST FIVE (5) DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL. [X] THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPROVED AND THE COURT ORDERS THE TRIAL POSTPONED TO JANUARY 4, 2017 AT 3:30 P.M. IN DEPARTMENT 506.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-04-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-04-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MICHAEL GREEN VIA COURT CALL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,914.49 FILED BY GREEN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT HELLER, DEBORAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEBORAH HELLER SET FOR MAR-01-2017 IS CONTINUED TO MAR-08-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL GREEN IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANT DEBORAH HELLER WAS NOT PRESENT AT THE CALLING OF THE CASE. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT IN THE COURTROOM BEFORE 11:00AM. HER PAPER WORK INDICTED THAT HER HEARING TIME WAS 11:00AM. DUE TO A MEDICAL APPOINTMENT THE DEFENDANT IS UNABLE TO RETURN AT 1:30PM. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS PREVIOUSLY RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREEN, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HELLER, DEBORAH $276.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $381.00, SECURITY DEPOSIT PAID BY PLAINTIFF IS $4,813; THE FOLLOWING DEDUCTIONS ARE ALLOWED: CARPET $2,820.00, PAINTING $1,317.00, DOOR REPAIR $100.00, CLEANING $300.00 = TOTAL $4,537.00. REFUND OF DEPOSIT IS $276.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 03/17/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "FORWARD TIME EXP-RETURN TO SENDER."
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HELLER, DEBORAH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREEN, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HELLER, DEBORAH $6,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 INTEREST, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,918.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000.00 AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE OF COMPLIANCE WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(I) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEBORAH HELLER ON 01/05/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "FORWARD TIME EXPIRED-RETURN TO SENDER."
